title: Tell Them Willie Boy Is Here
original_title: Tell Them Willie Boy Is Here
overview: While confronting the disapproving father of his girlfriend Lola, Native American man Willie Boy kills the man in self-defense, triggering a massive manhunt, led by Deputy Sheriff Christopher Cooper.
